CustomField.description: Reference to the date captured on the Account which is populated by flow called Completed Onboarding Events - Update Corresponding Account Date Fields
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Date of the first completed Onboarding Check-In Call (Outreach Meeting Type = OBS Single-Site: Brightwheel Wrap Up (Non-RR), OBS Single-Site: Brightwheel Wrap Up 15 min (Non-RR), OBS Multi-Site: Brightwheel Wrap Up (Non-RR), OBS Multi-Site: Brightwheel Wrap Up 15 min (Non-RR))
CustomField.label: Onboarding Check-in Call Completed
